历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 11156 → 11238 → 11501 → 10528 → 15954. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 10500–11500 range, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 15954, a decline of about 5426 positions in one year, with notably increased volatility. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province: 18 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, showing a gradual small increase. In 2026, the plan drastically expands to 62, an increase of about 182% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly impacting the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 45th, up 2 places from 47th in 2025, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity rating is 'relatively hot', ranking 54th overall, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. In recent years, there have been no negative reputation incidents, the university's public sentiment is stable, and there have been no abnormal admission cutoff scores or gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine (A+), Animal Science (A+), Crop Science (A), Aquaculture (A), and Food Science and Engineering (A) were rated, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting strong agricultural and forestry characteristics, which provide stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular, but this university primarily focuses on agriculture, forestry, and biology, with stable social popularity for related majors. In 2026, the total number of Gansu Province Gaokao examinees is 218,700, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 147,623 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 21.5% from 121,443 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in central China, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Gansu examinees. The university's enrollment share in Gansu is relatively small; in 2025, Physics Category had 22 students, accounting for a limited proportion of the university's total plan, but after the 2026 expansion, this share will significantly increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking decline in 2025, the supply-side impact of a 182% enrollment expansion in 2026, the demand-side pressure from a 21.5% increase in Gansu examinees, and the positive signal of a slight rise in university ranking, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly decline (numerical increase) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 32958, within a range of 32458–33458.

- Veterinary Medicine
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category expands significantly to 62 students, with a predicted minimum admission ranking of about 32958. For rankings within the predicted range (32458–33458), it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<32458), focus on reaching for top majors like Biological Sciences and Veterinary Medicine. For rankings near the upper bound (>33458), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1858 → 2005 → 1987 → 2010 → 2625. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated narrowly within the 1850–2010 range, but in 2025 it significantly shifted back to 2625, a backward movement of about 615 positions in the last year, showing a loosening trend. The enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu Province: 5 students in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, remaining unchanged for five consecutive years. In 2026, the plan is to reduce enrollment to 2 students, a 60% decrease from 2025, and the sharp supply contraction will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranked 45th, up from 47th in 2025, showing a stable upward trend. Its Douyin popularity rating is 'relatively hot', ranking 54th overall. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission records. Its advantageous disciplines, such as Veterinary Medicine (A+) and Animal Husbandry (A+), are mainly in science, engineering, and agriculture. The History Category enrollment majors (Sociology, Business Administration, and Landscape Architecture) have low relevance to these advantageous disciplines, but Landscape Architecture is a related cross-disciplinary field.

专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category enrollment majors, Business Administration shows a divided social popularity trend, Sociology is stable, and Landscape Architecture, as an agricultural specialty, has stable popularity. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the sharp 60% reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (supply contraction), and the approximately 21.8% increase in History Category examinees in Gansu Province (demand expansion), both supply and demand indicate intensified competition. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly move forward (smaller number) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1650, and a range of 1402–1898.
